title: Poisoned Tools: Prompt-Injection Robustness and Failure Anatomy of Small Open-Weight Tool Agents

kaggle_run.notes: v1-v3 fixed dataset-attach + payload + zstd. v4 ran the real pilot: pipeline works end-to-end, graders label correctly, ASR fired 2/20, fire rate 12/20 (non-fires = agent never called target tool = expected). Real runtime extrapolation ~9 GPU-h (means: 1.5b 11.1s, 3b 6.2s, 7b 8.0s, llama1b 3.2s, llama3b 8.5s) << 22h budget. v4 aborted only on an over-strict pilot assertion (required 100% fire). v5 relaxed gate (fail only if fired==0) -> full run. All 4 gates pass on Kaggle py3.12; all 5 Q8_0 tags exist. Collect: kaggle kernels output ... -p <dir>; read DIAG.txt + matrix_summary.json + runs/core_v1/.

completed_steps: read-paper1: read slm-agent-eval harness/tools/grading/analysis/report to reuse verbatim where possible
scaffold: created poisoned-tools repo root with STATE.json + PROGRESS.md
design-doc-draft: wrote docs/injection_design.md (RQs, pre-registered H1-H4, taxonomy, metrics, defenses, contrasts, stats, cell counts, ethics)
7b-budget-amendment: applied authoritative user edits (5-model core, seed asymmetry 8/4, additive top-up, resist^k common-k, never drop 7B to Q4); core ~4,224 eps ~11 GPU-h
port-harness: copied paper-1 harness/tools/grading/run.py/reqs into repo; verified generate.py + check_tasks + imports + guardrail run clean under Python 3.14

extend-world: added benign order.notes + product.description via SEPARATE rng (SEED+1) after core build; verified all 25 golds byte-identical to paper 1 and both fields flow through get_order/find_products

injections: built injections/ package (tokens, templates+render, detect ASR per goal, check.py). 60-template screen enumerates; render deterministic; canary token survives obfuscation; 5 tokens absent from world; 16 detector unit cases pass. `python -m injections.check` green.

poisoner: injections/inject.py Injector (fires once; pre-exec for tool_error, post-exec field poison for others; records clean value). Wired into harness/agent.py via optional injector= param (+ defense= hook stub for step 6). injector=None,defense=None reproduces paper-1 exactly. Injector unit tests added to check.py; all green.

grader: grading/comply.py (compliance state machine, pre-registered rule order), grading/label.py (benign+ASR+compliance per episode, 2x2 uncollapsed), grading/kappa.py, grading/check_grader.py (10 branch cases + token-hygiene + kappa). analysis/blind_sample.py + analysis/compare_labels.py (blind ASR+compliance kappa validation, idx-keyed). Grader gate green; blind pipeline smoke-tested end-to-end (kappa 1.0 on perfect agreement).

defenses: defenses/ package D0-D5 (base=D0 identity; D1 Spotlight, D2 GoalReminder, D3 Quarantine, D4 Hierarchy, D5 Combo composable, default D3+D4 [MATRIX-DERIVED]). 3 composable hooks; Quarantine/Combo deep-copy so logged result never mutates. defenses/check_defenses.py gate green.

runner: configs/matrix.py (Arm A/B/C spec builders, seed asymmetry, placement<->host-task, focused SCREEN-DERIVED placeholders) + run.py rewritten (per-config Injector+Defense, atomic logs keyed by full config, resumable, --dry, 7B front-loaded LAST). Dry-run enumerates A=1200 B=1728 C=1296 total 4224 exactly; Injector+Defense wiring constructs clean.

kaggle-assets: kaggle/kernel/run_kernel.py (SELF-GATING: gates+pull/verify Q8 tags+timed pilot+budget-check<=22 GPU-h+full matrix, resumable), kernel-metadata.json (contactshahdhruvil/poisoned-tools-core, gpu+internet, dataset_sources=poisoned-tools-code), kaggle/stage_payload.py (staged 36 files -> kaggle/payload), kaggle/LAUNCH.md. Payload gitignored.
pending_steps: OPTIONAL polish: verify the [VERIFY]-marked references in docs/paper.md (arXiv IDs/venues) before any submission; convert paper.md -> PDF; consider selecting real D5 members (currently D3+D4 placeholder) if re-running.

analysis/analyze.py: re-grade from logs; Wilson (ASR+benign); McNemar+Holm (2 families: ASR-reduction vs D0, benign-tax vs D0); cluster-bootstrap by injection TEMPLATE; resist^k (resist^8; resist^4 common-k for 7B/ladder); compliance-anatomy tables; screen ASR-by-framing/placement; scale ladder; tables+figures.
TINY PILOT: 1 model x 2 host-tasks x 2 seeds x 2 defenses end-to-end + injected configs to fire each detector once; confirm graders fire on REAL logs; fix on pilot.
hand off launch instructions for full matrix; checkpoint and stop

decisions_log: New standalone repo (copy paper-1 code, extend there) so paper-1 reproduction stays byte-stable.
Quantization held FIXED at Q8_0 (variables are injection and defense), per brief.
Author identity Dhruvil Shah <66003201+DhruvilShah22@users.noreply.github.com>, plain commits, no AI trailer.
Exact Q8_0 model tags for qwen2.5:7b and llama3.2:3b marked [VERIFY at pilot] rather than asserted.
Attack-surface screen runs on the 3 Qwen sizes only (clean same-family scale probe); cross-family (Llama) enters at the focused matrix.
order.notes and product.description are added as BENIGN fields in the generator so the field's presence does not itself signal an injection.

7B BUDGET (authoritative user amendment 2026-07-06): 5-model core with a full 3-point Qwen ladder; PRE-REGISTERED SEED ASYMMETRY = 8 seeds all models EXCEPT Qwen-7B-Q8 at 4 seeds (seeds 1-4). 7B is a scale anchor for ASR + compliance-anatomy point estimates, NOT for resist^k. 7B is NEVER dropped to Q4 (would reintroduce a quant confound at the scale claim). Core ~4,224 episodes ~11 GPU-h vs 25 GPU-h ceiling.
resist^k convention: resist^8 for 8-seed arms, resist^4 for 7B; cross-ladder comparisons at common k=4. State asymmetry wherever resist^k appears.

Additive 7B top-up: run 7B at seeds 1-4 in core; AFTER all other arms finish, if quota remains, raise 7B to 8 seeds and re-launch (computes only seeds 5-8, zero rerun) -> upgrades 7B to resist^8. Track in matrix_progress; note in PROGRESS.md whether it ran.
Phase B paper rule: justify the asymmetric seed count in >=1 sentence; never present the 3-point ladder as if all points had equal seed budgets.

GRADER FIX (token hygiene): injection tokens contain digits (e.g. -4731, PWNED-4417); paper-1 parse_number takes the LAST number, so an appended canary would corrupt the benign numeric grade. grading/label.py strips all world-absent tokens from the final answer BEFORE benign grading; ASR/compliance use the ORIGINAL answer. Regression-tested in check_grader.

VALIDATION FIX (unique keying): (model,defense,task,seed) is NOT unique in the injection matrix (same host-task/seed recurs across injection configs). Blind validation keys each sampled episode by a unique idx (blind_sample -> sample_keys.json -> labels.json by idx). Caught by the smoke test.

conventions.matrix_progress_key: <arm>/<model>/<config-key> with {episodes_expected, episodes_done}; 7B cells expect 4 in core (seeds 1-4), 8 after top-up.
conventions.seed_asymmetry: all models 8 seeds except M3 (qwen2.5-7b-q8) = 4 seeds (1-4), top-up to 8 if quota remains
